dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
$(MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET)
NSApplication
Notch Island media controls may use Apple Events for local music apps.
Notch Island can read local Apple Music playback metadata when the media module is enabled.
Notch Island can capture local audio levels for visualizer modules when audio features are enabled.
Notch Island can show Bluetooth audio device status when enabled.
Notch Island can show calendar and reminder previews when enabled.
Notch Island can show camera privacy indicators when enabled.
Codex Statistics may request contacts access for enabled Notch Island modules.
Codex Statistics may request location access for enabled Notch Island modules.
Notch Island can show microphone privacy indicators when enabled.
Codex Statistics may request photo library access for enabled Notch Island modules.
Notch Island can show reminders alongside calendar previews when enabled.
Codex Statistics may request speech recognition access for enabled Notch Island modules.
Codex Statistics may request elevated privileges for helper tools when explicitly enabled.
Codex Statistics can use screen recording for Notch Island recording indicators and screen assistant modules when enabled.
https://1pitaph.github.io/claude-stats-releases/appcast.xml
q08NR2AvmmN/WuX7o7jQmYMsaL/5bPmiX/xlo3flCZY=
